children.heading: Critical failure at a reserved or transferred work
children.label: a Critical failure at a reserved or transferred work
A
children.text: construction of the reserved or transferred work began on or before ; andJanuary 1, 1915

children.label: B
children.text: a unit of the reserved or transferred work suffered a critical failure in Bureau of Reclamation infrastructure during the 2-year period ending on , that resulted in the failure to deliver water to project beneficiaries.November 15, 2021

children.heading: Use of funds
children.label: 2 Use of funds
children.text: Rehabilitation, repair, and replacement activities for a transferred or reserved work using amounts made available under may be used for the entire transferred or reserved work, regardless of whether the critical failure was limited to a single project of the overall work.section 3201(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Nonreimbursable funds
children.label: 3 Nonreimbursable funds
children.text: Notwithstanding , amounts made available to a reserved or transferred work under shall be nonreimbursable to the United States.section 510b(b) of this titlesection 3201(2)(A) of this title
